report.summary: Community growth cycle (Mar 16): Bloomberg Screener Live Data as lead narrative for Sprint 58 launch; EIP-7702 deep-dive thread drafted (6 posts, 24-day Pectra countdown); GENIUS Act + Meme Launchpads new page drop content; April 15 tax 30-day countdown; full Thursday newsletter drafted; 2 social cards created (Bloomberg Screener Live + EIP-7702 Before/After); posting schedule: Mon live-data tweet + Discord → Tue EIP-7702 thread → Wed tax + GENIUS Act tweets + Discord 2-guide drop → Thu newsletter → Fri community poll.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet (Monday): Bloomberg Screener V3 Live Data — hook on 'we've been running on mock data, that changes this week'; DefiLlama live TVL/APY/Volume feeding in; no Bloomberg subscription needed; CTA to /tools/bloomberg-screener

Twitter thread (Tuesday, 6 posts): EIP-7702 deep dive — hook on '24 days until EIP-7702 goes live'; dumb vs smart wallet explainer; 5 DeFi steps → 1 click; gasless onboarding UX; protocols already building (Uniswap, Coinbase SW, Biconomy, Safe); mainnet April 10 CTA to /learn/ethereum-pectra-upgrade-guide
Tweet (Wednesday): Crypto Tax Guide 2026 — 30 days to April 15 US deadline; every swap/yield/NFT taxable; CTA to /learn/crypto-tax-guide-2026
Tweet (Wednesday): GENIUS Act new page drop — first major US stablecoin bill; reserves, licensing, USDC/USDT status; CTA to /learn/genius-act-stablecoin-guide
Discord/Telegram (Monday): Sprint 58 Bloomberg Screener live data announcement — building anticipation before deploy
Discord/Telegram (Wednesday): 2-guide drop — GENIUS Act stablecoin guide + Meme Launchpads Guide 2026 with direct URLs
Twitter poll (Friday): Feature vote — what tool do you want next on degen0x; drives community engagement and Sprint 59 signal

Newsletter section (Thursday Mar 19): 3 subject lines drafted; market pulse ($BTC $71K + Pectra countdown + Fed Mar 19 meeting); Bloomberg Screener V3 launch + GENIUS Act + Meme Launchpads in 'New on degen0x'; featured reads: Pectra guide + Tax guide; Degen Corner on EIP-7702 gasless UX wars

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: social-bloomberg-screener-live.svg — 1200×630 social card: live screener preview panel showing 5 DeFi protocols (Aave, Lido, Uniswap V4, EigenLayer, Pendle) with real-style TVL/APY/Volume columns; LIVE green badge; Sprint 58 attribution; title 'Live Data is here' with brand gradient; 3 feature pills (1,000+ Protocols, 5-min refresh, Free Forever). Saved to /public/social-bloomberg-screener-live.svg

social-eip-7702-smart-accounts.svg — 1200×630 social card: split-panel Before/After comparison; BEFORE: 5-step DeFi flow with 5 separate gas fees each (red); AFTER: connect + one-click action box (green) with '$0 gas to user'; 24-day Pectra countdown badge; protocol adoption strip (Uniswap, Coinbase SW, Biconomy, Safe); EIP-7702 label. Saved to /public/social-eip-7702-smart-accounts.svg

sections.title: Analytics Context
items: Site is Day 17 — GSC organic signals expected imminently (day 14-21 window); Bloomberg Screener going live is perfectly timed before organic traffic arrives

Sprint 58 focus: DefiLlama Live API integration for Bloomberg Screener V3 — replacing mock data; narrative angle is 'we just got real'; this is the single strongest credibility tweet available right now
Ethereum Pectra countdown moved from 25 days (v10) to 24 days — window tightening adds urgency to EIP-7702 content; April 10 mainnet date confirmed
April 15 US crypto tax deadline: 30 days out — search intent for 'crypto tax 2026', 'bitcoin taxes', 'defi yield tax' is at peak; daily urgency increasing
GENIUS Act and Meme Launchpads pages are queued (build fix unblocking them) — content and Discord/Telegram announcements pre-drafted and ready to post on publish day
Community poll (Friday) feeds Sprint 59 prioritization — top feature votes will be reviewed by CEO/PM for next sprint planning

Posting schedule: Monday live-data tweet + Discord Sprint 58 → Tuesday 6-post EIP-7702 thread → Wednesday tax countdown + GENIUS Act drop + Discord 2-guide → Thursday newsletter → Friday community poll
